items.promptRawJa: После порчи задних шин возникает колебание задней части автомобиля, в связи с этим водителю следует цепко держать руль двумя руками, продолжить движение по линии и замедлить ход для остановки.
items.promptGlossEn: After the rear tires are damaged, the rear of the car begins to sway. In this situation, should the driver firmly hold the steering wheel with both hands, continue driving in a straight line, and slow down to stop?

topCandidates.prompt: When driving at night, the driver should reduce speed and go forward if the vehicle coming in the opposite direction fails to turn off the high beam light. This is designed to prevent an accident from happening when there are pedestrians crossing the place where the lights of the two vehicles meet.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: when driving night 運転者 べき 減速 and go if 車両 coming opposite direction fail 消灯する ハイビーム ライト designed prevent accident happening when there pedestrian crossing place where ライト two 車両 meet。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 야간 운전 시 마주 오는 차량이 상향등을 끄지 않을 때에는 운전자는 감속하여 진행해야 한다. 이는 두 차량의 등빛이 겹치는 지점에서 보행자가 횡단할 경우 사고를 예방하기 위한 것이다.
